inventory: I am on the streets
There is a wedding hall here.
I know there's a recycling sweatshop behind the building
I see garbage strewn near the gutter.

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where some nintendo comfy game like tomodachi life had become super mainstream and lots of merch was made.

They all had nfc sensors and magnets, and people in third world countries had recycled its parts to make everyday things like clothes and paper plates.

Then someone hacked into the amiibo network and started pulling people with super magnetism.
right_panel.footer_note: Ah, I knew this would happen.

inventory: The interface is a slippery mobile keyboard.
The overengineering is palpable.
I am in the inner world's inner world

right_panel.content: I had a dream where i was vibecoding and the ai started making personal attacks
right_panel.footer_note: This was like my paranoia dream where I showed the wikipedia entry for my fetishes

inventory: I experience the world only from a screen
Distance is priority

right_panel.content:
Had a dream about people ai generating slop movies and that'd seeped into real life and mumbai was under attack by kaiju dinosaurs 
 
I was some national treasure under special protection who had to work only three hours a week

inventory: is this a videogame

right_panel.content: I had dreams last night of screens full of lasers and projectiles and someone whispering Odysseus over and over
right_panel.footer_note: i namedrop Achilles and Patroclus to performative male

inventory: Orientalist?
Fascist projection of a pure state, free from degeneracy?
I watched the party scene from Lost in Translation too

right_panel.content: Had a dream where nivi organized a nobel prize equivalent for Japanese residents in india. The winner had introduced weed to japan or some synthetic equivalent and nivi was already a pro at using it

inventory: I had gifted K a copy of Mark Fisher's book once
My attempts at converting people into debatebros was looking futile

right_panel.content: Had a dream where K took me to a high school library to steal a book about economics from there
right_panel.footer_note: I like acid marxism because dude acid lmao

inventory: hehehaha dommy mommy meme xddd
I am getting ulted on the street

right_panel.content: Had a nap dream where psylocke kept ulting me when i try to sleep and i mean it literally not metaphorically
right_panel.footer_note: it means my body physically hurt

inventory: My dead dad was also there

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i died because i was in Bangalore as the nuke fell there.
I was able to experience death on mental command, like turned off sensation on all my nerve endings irl.
right_panel.footer_note: Blunt metaphor for nuking my Bangalore dreams

inventory: I check to see if the grass is anime or pixelated

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i got a machine and could listen to my pet typhlosion.
We were travelling together.

My typhlosion♀ was having trouble courting a male one so i used the pokemon speech machine to help
right_panel.footer_note: No projection of second person desires here

inventory: I had seen this art installation once where they made a fight stick with only Akuma's "ten" kanji on it as the only button

right_panel.content: Had a dream where tan told me ac shadows is very good actually and then my keyboard changed to a posh one where each key is an oled display
right_panel.footer_note: AC Shadows is so bad as a story, what compelled them to decompress 12 days of historical events into a multi year epic

inventory: Back in 2018 I was genuinely impressed by the Black Panther movie.
How even the most mainstream of kids movies were allowed to express thoughts that would get the average Bhakt pissbaby livid.

right_panel.content: Had a dream where I was pretending to be black panther from Marvel Rivals and was fighting a tiny tiger. I kept throwing spears and dashing until my cooldowns ran out and then it bit my finger
right_panel.footer_note: I hate playing twitch-reaction up-close heroes. There is definitely a design problem in conveying presence in the hero-shooter engine

inventory: tan and my modding dreams never came to fruition
he had a google play publishing co. called suttit tech
he had an app for math formulae

right_panel.content: Had a dream where i met some genius SE Asian guy who used his intellect to decompile and modify old games. Like a loving indian parent, I told tan to compare himself with him, "see? How he has made good use of his intellect?"

inventory: Contact with autism is one of my most beloved experiences
I ran into this cafe in Guwahati once run by a Japanese Vtuber
He had the entire library of every Shonen Jump series.
Cutouts of his vtuber persona
Love Live and Idolm@ster music playing all the time

right_panel.content: Had a dream where some guy nearby was the biggest Ace Attorney fan in the country, he lived in a humble old shack but had piles of manga in the room and cutouts of the main characters
right_panel.footer_note: I zoned out of the AA franchise when i didnt have buttons for immediate punchgratification

inventory: Original Ken Sugimori art is Hauntology in action
They have this faded watercolor look to them that is now attributed to poor scanners.
Same goes for the pastel pink Sailor Moon cels, they were corrupted VHS tapes.
Truly the feathered dinosaurs and colored Greek statues of nerd media

right_panel.content:
Had a dream where i went into this anime merch store that was clearly failing, like it was only 30% usual 3d printed stuff, 30% normal showpieces and 30% grocery. I was getting sad at Nivi's sponsors and then i found this sick RBY themed jacket and shoes.

Red was Pikachu themed(?)

Blue had pixel art

Green had a dope magikarp shoes and fisherman jacket

Yellow was more normiechu
right_panel.footer_note: Dead Malls are also Hauntology in action. They represented inaccessible territory to me as a child, during their "alive" state, because I had no ability to visit them on my own. I fetishized them as "where western kids third space" and assumed "youth culture" developed organically there.
